mapper.select:
SELECT house.id, house.project_name as house_title, CONCAT('/api/profile/', (SELECT file_key FROM tb_house_image WHERE house_id = house.id AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1)) as cover, house.house_type, CASE WHEN house.house_type = 3 THEN house.rent_price_fen / 100.0 ELSE house.total_price_fen / 1000000.0 END as price, house.layout, house.area, COUNT(f.id) as fav_count, MAX(f.create_time) as last_fav, CASE WHEN COUNT(f.id) > 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_hot FROM tb_user_favorite f JOIN tb_house house ON f.target_id = house.id AND f.target_type = 1
AND house.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{houseTitle}, '%')
GROUP BY house.id ORDER BY fav_count DESC
SELECT u.* FROM tb_user_favorite f JOIN tb_app_user u ON f.app_user_id = u.id WHERE f.target_id = #{houseId} AND f.target_type = 1 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.phone, u.avatar_url as avatar, f.create_time as favorite_time FROM tb_user_favorite f JOIN tb_app_user u ON f.app_user_id = u.id WHERE f.target_id = #{houseId} AND f.target_type = 1 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
